text: I first asked when a new card would arrive, but now that date has passed and the card is missing.
label: card_arrival

text: Not looking for a general shipping estimate; the card that was mailed to me never reached my flat.
label: card_arrival

text: The promised delivery window ended last week, and I need to know what happened to the card.
label: card_arrival

text: My card may have been lost in transit even though I already ordered it.
label: card_arrival

text: I have not ordered the spare card yet; I only want to know the usual delivery time.
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: Before I request a card, how long would shipping normally take?
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: This is not about a lost card. I need the expected delivery window for a future order.
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: What shipping estimate should I plan around if I order a physical card today?
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: The transfer is still processing in my app; the recipient has not checked yet.
label: pending_transfer

text: It is not a missing recipient complaint. My own transfer status is stuck pending.
label: pending_transfer

text: I saw a waiting transfer entry after sending money yesterday.
label: pending_transfer

text: The bank transfer has no final status even though it was submitted.
label: pending_transfer

text: My side says sent, but the recipient insists the money never arrived.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: The payee checked twice and cannot see the transfer, although I completed it.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: This is beyond a pending label in my app; the receiver is missing the funds.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: The person I sent money to still has no deposit in their account.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: The merchant says the card transaction is authorized but it still shows pending.
label: pending_card_payment

text: Not an unknown charge yet; the card purchase is only waiting to settle.
label: pending_card_payment

text: The shop payment is stuck in processing after checkout.
label: pending_card_payment

text: A card purchase remains pending even though I left the store.
label: pending_card_payment

text: A completed card purchase appeared that I cannot identify.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: This is not just pending; an unfamiliar merchant charged my card.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: The card transaction cleared, but nobody here made it.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: I recognize the pending line, but this separate card payment is unknown.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: I want to start the refund process for a purchase I regret.
label: request_refund

text: Not a missing refund; I have not requested one yet and need to begin.
label: request_refund

text: Please help me cancel the order and ask for money back.
label: request_refund

text: How can I open a refund request for this merchant charge?
label: request_refund

text: The store says the refund was sent, but the money is absent.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: I already returned the item and received confirmation, yet no refund is visible.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: This is not about starting a request; the refund should have arrived.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: My balance still does not show the return credit.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: The card payment appeared, then the amount came back to my account.
label: reverted_card_payment?

text: Not a merchant refund request; the original card authorization reversed itself.
label: reverted_card_payment?

text: The purchase vanished and the money returned without me asking for a refund.
label: reverted_card_payment?

text: Why did the card transaction get undone after it looked successful?
label: reverted_card_payment?

text: I am asking whether this card can be used at the cash machine, not about a fee.
label: cash_withdrawal_card

text: Which card should I use if I want to take out money?
label: cash_withdrawal_card

text: The issue is card eligibility for ATM cash, not cash that failed to dispense.
label: cash_withdrawal_card

text: Can I withdraw cash with this account card while travelling?
label: cash_withdrawal_card

text: The ATM gave me cash, but a separate fee appeared afterwards.
label: cash_withdrawal_charge

text: Not card eligibility and not a wrong amount; I want the reason for the withdrawal charge.
label: cash_withdrawal_charge

text: I got the money from the machine and then saw a cash withdrawal fee.
label: cash_withdrawal_charge

text: Please explain the cost added to the cash machine transaction.
label: cash_withdrawal_charge

text: The machine gave me some cash, but less than the amount deducted.
label: wrong_amount_of_cash_received

text: Not a fee issue; the number of bills from the ATM was wrong.
label: wrong_amount_of_cash_received

text: I asked for one amount and the cash machine dispensed another.
label: wrong_amount_of_cash_received

text: My balance changed by more than the cash I actually received.
label: wrong_amount_of_cash_received

text: I understand the reason; now I need to know where to finish verification.
label: verify_my_identity

text: How do I upload documents so the identity check is completed?
label: verify_my_identity

text: This is not a why question. I need the steps to prove who I am.
label: verify_my_identity

text: The app blocks me until I complete identity verification.
label: verify_my_identity

text: I am not asking how to upload files; why do you need this check at all?
label: why_verify_identity

text: What triggered the identity verification request on my account?
label: why_verify_identity

text: Why must I prove who I am after already using the service?
label: why_verify_identity

text: Explain the reason for asking me to verify identity now.
label: why_verify_identity
